DispInit.Button.Title: Disposition Initiative
DispInit.Error.NoSelectedToken: Select all tokens that will be part of the encounter. There’s no need to create the encounter beforehand.
DispInit.SwapInitiative.NoFilteredTarget: No targets match the current filters.
DispInit.SwapInitiative.Title: Swap Initiative
DispInit.Settings.GroupPlayersToFriendly: When enabled, players are grouped together with friendly tokens.
DispInit.Settings.GroupingModeHint: Choose how tokens are split into initiative groups.
DispInit.Settings.InitiativeTiebreakHint:
Add a decimal value to group initiative rolls.
Group initiatives will never result in the exact same value.
DispInit.Settings.InitiativeRollModeHint: Choose whether groups roll initiative or use passive initiative.
DispInit.Settings.RerollInitiativeEveryR: When enabled, it will reroll group initiatives every new round.
DispInit.Warn.NoSwapTargets: No valid initiative swap targets are available.
DispInit.Warn.SwapIncapacitated: Initiative cannot be swapped while either combatant is incapacitated.
DispInit.Warn.SwapRequiresInitiative: Both combatants must have initiative values before they can be swapped.
